message:
Fix tokenizer imports from main PyAOT utils

- Updated hashmap API: keyIterator() → keys() for Zig 0.15.2
- Fixed imports in bpe_trainer, aho_corasick_builder, dict, wordpiece
- Added token_optimizer/build.zig for standalone builds

Note: token_optimizer proxy.zig still needs std.http.Client fix for Zig 0.15.2
